<!-- dropbox: https://www.dropbox.com/preview/CbDD_Dienstordner/literatur/altes%20corpus/chunked/chunked/Band12-1_chunk005.pdf#page=4 -->
<!-- citation-page-top: Band12 p206 -->

HERRENCHIEMSE


[[File:Band12-1_chunk005_p004_img001.jpg|thumb]]



[[File:Band12-1_chunk005_p004_img002.jpg|thumb]]



[[File:Band12-1_chunk005_p004_img003.jpg|thumb]]



[[File:Band12-1_chunk005_p004_img004.jpg|thumb|A Himmelfahrt Marie]]



[[File:Band12-1_chunk005_p004_img005.jpg|thumb|A, Anbetung der Könige]]


206
<!-- citation-page-bottom: Band12 p207 -->
